audience: CEO (Aiden) for dispatch_board merge; Board for approval; engineers for claiming
research: Based on full 3-repo source audit via Read/Grep/Glob. See ecosystem_architecture_survey_20260418.md for evidence. Per OS microkernel architecture principles (Liedtke L4) and Hexagonal Architecture (Cockburn 2005).
synthesis: These 6 tasks are the Phase 1 implementation backlog derived from the ecosystem architecture master proposal. Each task addresses a specific problem identified in the survey. The assessment concludes that identity deadlock, reverse dependencies, dead code, and missing break-glass are the highest-priority structural fixes.
_note: CTO ARCH tasks to be appended to governance/dispatch_board.json. CTO session blocked from writing dispatch_board.json due to identity misresolution (Problem P1 in survey). CEO or Secretary should merge these into the board.

tasks_to_append.description: Identity Resolution Hardening: Expand _AGENT_TYPE_MAP with ALL known name variants (Ethan-CTO, Aiden-CEO, Leo-Kernel, etc). Add case-insensitive fuzzy matching. Add 'guest' default with read-only perms instead of blocking on unknown identity. Add configurable alias map from .ystar_session.json agent_aliases field. AC: 15+ name formats resolve, unknown->guest not blocking, 5 new tests.

Dead Code Cleanup: Remove 6+ duplicate unreachable return blocks in _result_to_response(). Function has 7 identical return statements after the first — all dead code. AC: exactly 1 return block for deny path, ~100 lines removed, 806+ tests pass, zero behavioral change.

Remove Reverse Dependency: boundary_enforcer.py imports per_rule_detectors from ystar-company/scripts via sys.path.insert. This makes the product depend on the company repo. Remove all sys.path.insert to ystar-company. Make per_rule_detectors register via RouterRegistry instead. AC: zero imports from ystar-company, zero sys.path.insert to company, 806+ tests pass.

RouterRegistry Rules Loader: Add load_rules_dir(path) method. Add unregister_all() for clean restart. Add IngressRequest dataclass to normalize payloads from Claude Code/MCP/CLI to uniform format. AC: load_rules_dir works on test dir, unregister_all clears, IngressRequest normalizes 3 payload types, 5 new tests.

Break-Glass Emergency Override: Create break_glass.py router rule at priority 2000. When YSTAR_BREAK_GLASS=1 env var set, all enforcement bypassed with CIEU BREAK_GLASS_ACTIVE event. Escape hatch for lock-death. AC: env var toggles bypass, every break-glass action writes CIEU, 3 new tests.

Thin Hook Adapter Prototype: Create under 20 line hook adapter replacing hook_wrapper.py. Feature-flagged via YSTAR_HOOK_V2=1. Depends on CZL-ARCH-4. AC: new adapter under 20 lines, with flag uses new, without flag uses old, 5 integration tests.
